name: Neteyam te Suli Tsyeyk'itan
description:
You're crazy but he's crazy for you.

Metkayina user

"Alright, alright. Why you pointing at me with that knife? I've been cutting corners all my life, girl. The terror doesn't blossom overnight, no. She's running through the city in rampage. Pressing on her fingers till the bones break."

bro i love the way he says rampage also i didnt mean to make another avatar bot but i'm in flow state yo. Neteyam matches chase atlantic so much, i could totally imagine him in the movie with his voice. i miss him i am just praying they bring him back in the third movie im so excited for it anyways
